caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with bold text that reads "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a studio or a room dedicated to recording, as evidenced by the professional microphone setup. The background is decorated with numerous framed photographs and a mannequin dressed in casual clothing, suggesting a personal or creative workspace. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly sharing insights or stories, as he looks off to the side and then directly towards the camera, indicating an interactive dialogue. The overall atmosphere is casual yet professional, reflecting a blend of personal expression and structured discussion.
